# Binance Futures Trading Bot - Copilot Instructions

This is a professional Binance futures trading bot project focused on:

## Core Features
- Advanced candlestick pattern recognition and technical analysis
- Market trend analysis using multiple timeframes
- Automated long/short position management
- Intelligent profit-taking and stop-loss mechanisms
- High-accuracy trading signals with AI-powered decision making
- Real-time market data processing and analysis

## Technical Stack
- Python 3.9+ with asyncio for high-performance trading
- Binance Futures API integration
- Machine learning libraries (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, tensorflow/pytorch)
- Technical analysis libraries (TA-Lib, pandas-ta)
- Real-time data processing and WebSocket connections
- Advanced risk management and portfolio optimization

## Code Guidelines
- Use async/await patterns for API calls and real-time data processing
- Implement proper error handling and retry mechanisms for API calls
- Follow professional trading bot architecture with modular components
- Prioritize security for API key management and sensitive data
- Use type hints and comprehensive documentation
- Implement comprehensive logging and monitoring systems
- Focus on high-frequency, low-latency operations for futures trading

## Safety and Risk Management
- Always implement proper position sizing and risk management
- Include circuit breakers and emergency stop mechanisms
- Validate all trading signals before execution
- Implement comprehensive backtesting and paper trading modes
- Monitor for API rate limits and connection stability
